summary: Comprehensive E2E testing of Gomes Webdesign portfolio (German). Backend: 8/8 pytest tests passed (health, validation, contact create+persist, _id exclusion). Frontend: All sections render correctly (Hero, Über mich, Projects with 3 cards + external links opening in new tabs, Skills with 5 items, Contact with German validation, mailto link, Footer with 'Nach oben' button). Mobile nav toggle works. Resend email integration returns status='success' for valid submission. No critical issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: Project 3 link href uses URL-encoded space (`join%20crm`) which works but the source URL contains a literal space — consider using a hyphen or %20 explicitly in source data for clarity.

server.py: `_send_contact_email` runs synchronously before persistence; on slow Resend API it can delay the response. Consider firing email asynchronously (background task) after persisting the message.

server.py: GET /api/contact returns ALL messages (last 500) with no auth — this leaks all submitted contact data publicly. Recommend adding auth or restricting endpoint, or removing it from production.
server.py datetime conversion: storing as ISO string but reading back as datetime via fromisoformat works; consider standardising to BSON datetime to avoid str/datetime juggling.
Custom cursor uses 'cursor: none' globally on desktop (intentional per spec) — confirmed not blocking interactions.
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_ prefixed contact messages via POST /api/contact during testing — visible in MongoDB collection 'contact_messages'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py cover health, validation (missing fields, invalid email, short message, empty name), and full create→persist flow with _id exclusion check. Frontend Playwright flow tested: hero CTA scroll, nav links scroll smoothly via Lenis (~1.4s), project external links target=_blank, skills section animated, contact validation in German, valid submit shows success state, mobile nav toggle opens menu with 4 links. GET /api/contact is publicly accessible — flag for potential security review.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs to RCA. All flows working as specified.
